sections.paragraph:
προσδηλόω fut. προσδηλώσω (Aristot., Anal. Post. 2, 7, 92b, 23) to clarify in addition, explain further (in a second letter) IEph 20:1 (w. a rel. clause foll.).—DELG s.v. δῆλος.

fut. fut. = fut.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

foll. foll. = followed, following

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 877
